1864640.name: Dragon Realms - Towers 'n' Dragons Demo
1864640.description:
In the demo of Towers 'n' Dragons you will take on the role of Vemartheri - an ambitious strategist trying to defend the different regions of his country and its expansion against dragons big and small!
Use the knowledge you gain to expand your arsenal and improve its abilities and be careful with your resources.

The story you play is part of the prologue for what's to come. Enjoy!
